title: Karni Mata Temple
tagline: Karni Mata Temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Karni Mata Temple of Deshnoke (Hindi: करणी माता मंदिर), also known as Madh Deshnoke, is a prominent Hindu temple dedicated to Karni Mata at the town of Deshnoke, located 30 km sout
overview.description: Karni Mata Temple of Deshnoke (Hindi: करणी माता मंदिर), also known as Madh Deshnoke, is a prominent Hindu temple dedicated to Karni Mata at the town of Deshnoke, located 30 km south of Bikaner, in Rajasthan. It has become the most important pilgrimage site for devotees of Charani sagatis after access to Hinglaj was restricted following the partition of India. The temple is also a popular destination for tourists and pilgrims and is renowned, both in India and internationally, as the "Temple of Rats" due to the numerous rodents known as kābā which are considered holy and treated with utmost car

topPlaces.name: Deshnoke
topPlaces.description: Deshnoke is a town in the Bikaner district of Rajasthan, India. The town is famous for the Karni Mata Temple and was established by Goddess Karni-ji herself who led her followers to this region.

topPlaces.name: Palana, Bikaner
topPlaces.description: Palana is a village in Bikaner District, Rajasthan, India and It is 52 km from Malasar village of Bikaner District

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Karni Mata Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Karni Mata Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Karni Mata Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Bikaner Airport (Nal) (34 km) and the nearest railway station is Bikaner Junction (25 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Karni Mata Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Karni Mata Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Karni Mata Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Karni Mata Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Karni Mata Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Deshnoke, Palana, Bikaner.
